verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc ostendit mihi Dominus Deus : et ecce fictor locustæ in principio germinantium serotini imbris, et ecce serotinus post tonsionem regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ה הִרְאַ֙נִי֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה וְהִנֵּה֙ יוֹצֵ֣ר גֹּבַ֔י בִּתְחִלַּ֖ת עֲל֣וֹת הַלָּ֑קֶשׁ וְהִ֨נֵּה־לֶ֔קֶשׁ אַחַ֖ר גִּזֵּ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: These things the Lord God shewed to me: and behold the locust was formed in the beginning of the shooting up of the latter rain, and lo, it was the latter rain after the king's mowing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra, Herra osoitti minulle näyssä; ja katso, yksi seisoi, joka heinäsirkkoja teki, juuri silloin, kuin oras rupesi käymään ylös, toisen kerran sittekuin kuningas oli antanut niittää.
verses.king_james: Thus hath the Lord God shewed unto me; and, behold, he formed grasshoppers in the beginning of the shooting up of the latter growth; and, lo, it was the latter growth after the king’s mowings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factum est, cum consummasset comedere herbam terræ, dixi : Domine Deus, propitius esto, obsecro ; quis suscitabit Jacob, quia parvulus est ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה אִם־כִּלָּה֙ לֶֽאֱכוֹל֙ אֶת־עֵ֣שֶׂב הָאָ֔רֶץ וָֽאֹמַ֗ר אֲדֹנָ֤י יֱהֹוִה֙ סְֽלַֽח־נָ֔א מִ֥י יָק֖וּם יַעֲקֹ֑ב כִּ֥י קָטֹ֖ן הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it came to pass, that when they had made an end of eating the grass of the land, I said: O Lord God, be merciful, I beseech thee: who shall raise up Jacob, for he is very little?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin ne niin tahtoivat kaiken tulon syödä maalta, sanoin minä: voi Herra, Herra, ole armollinen! kuka tahtoo Jakobin taas auttaa? sillä hän on aivan vähä.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, that when they had made an end of eating the grass of the land, then I said, O Lord God, forgive, I beseech thee: by whom shall Jacob arise? for he is small.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misertus est Dominus super hoc : Non erit, dixit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִחַ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה עַל־זֹ֑את לֹ֥א תִֽהְיֶ֖ה אָמַ֥ר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord had pity upon this: It shall not be, said the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra katui sitä: ei sen pidä tapahtuman, sanoi Herra.
verses.king_james: The Lord repented for this: It shall not be, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc ostendit mihi Dominus Deus : et ecce vocabat judicium ad ignem Dominus Deus ; et devoravit abyssum multam, et comedit simul partem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֤ה הִרְאַ֙נִי֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה וְהִנֵּ֥ה קֹרֵ֛א לָרִ֥ב בָּאֵ֖שׁ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה וַתֹּ֙אכַל֙ אֶת־תְּה֣וֹם רַבָּ֔ה וְאָכְלָ֖ה אֶת־הַחֵֽלֶק׃
verses.douay_rheims: These things the Lord God shewed to me: and behold the Lord called for judgment unto fire, and it devoured the great deep, and ate up a part at the same time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra, Herra osoitti minulla näyssä, ja katso, Herra, Herra kutsui tulen rankaisemaan, jonka piti suuren syvyyden syömän, ja se söi jo parhaan osan.
verses.king_james: Thus hath the Lord God shewed unto me: and, behold, the Lord God called to contend by fire, and it devoured the great deep, and did eat up a part.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi : Domine Deus, quiesce, obsecro ; quis suscitabit Jacob, quia parvulus est ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמַ֗ר אֲדֹנָ֤י יֱהֹוִה֙ חֲדַל־נָ֔א מִ֥י יָק֖וּם יַעֲקֹ֑ב כִּ֥י קָטֹ֖ן הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said: O Lord God, cease, I beseech thee, who shall raise up Jacob, for he is a little one?
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä sanoin: voi Herra, Herra, lakkaa nyt, kuka tahtoo Jakobia taas auttaa? sillä hän on aivan vähä.
verses.king_james: Then said I, O Lord God, cease, I beseech thee: by whom shall Jacob arise? for he is small.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misertus est Dominus super hoc : Sed et istud non erit, dixit Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִחַ֥ם יְהֹוָ֖ה עַל־זֹ֑את גַּם־הִיא֙ לֹ֣א תִֽהְיֶ֔ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord had pity upon this. Yea this also shall not be, said the Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Herra katui myös sitä: ei senkään pidä tapahtuman, sanoi Herra, Herra.
verses.king_james: The Lord repented for this: This also shall not be, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc ostendit mihi Dominus : et ecce Dominus stans super murum litum, et in manu ejus trulla cæmentarii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֣ה הִרְאַ֔נִי וְהִנֵּ֧ה אֲדֹנָ֛י נִצָּ֖ב עַל־חוֹמַ֣ת אֲנָ֑ךְ וּבְיָד֖וֹ אֲנָֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: These things the Lord shewed to me: and behold the Lord was standing upon a plastered wall, and in his hand a mason's trowel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän osoitti minulle tämän näyssä, ja katso, Herra seisoi muurin päällä, joka mittanuoralla mitattu oli, ja hän piti mittanuoran kädessänsä.
verses.king_james: Thus he shewed me: and, behold, the Lord stood upon a wall made by a plumbline, with a plumbline in his hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Dominus ad me : Quid tu vides, Amos ? Et dixi : Trullam cæmentarii. Et dixit Dominus :   Ecce ego ponam trullam in medio populi mei Israël ;  non adjiciam ultra superinducere eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֵלַ֗י מָֽה־אַתָּ֤ה רֹאֶה֙ עָמ֔וֹס וָאֹמַ֖ר אֲנָ֑ךְ וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֲדֹנָ֗י הִנְנִ֨י שָׂ֤ם אֲנָךְ֙ בְּקֶ֙רֶב֙ עַמִּ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לֹא־אוֹסִ֥יף ע֖וֹד עֲב֥וֹר לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to me: What seest thou, Amos? And I said: A mason's trowel. And the Lord said: Behold, I will lay down the trowel in the midst of my people Israel. I will plaster them over no more.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi minulle: mitäs näet, Amos? minä sanoin: mittanuoran. Herra sanoi: katso, minä tahdon vetää mittanuoran keskelle minun kansaani Israelia, ja en käy enään häntä ohitse.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto me, Amos, what seest thou? And I said, A plumbline. Then said the Lord, Behold, I will set a plumbline in the midst of my people Israel: I will not again pass by them any more:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et demolientur excelsa idoli,  et sanctificationes Israël desolabuntur,  et consurgam super domum Jeroboam in gladio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָשַׁ֙מּוּ֙ בָּמ֣וֹת יִשְׂחָ֔ק וּמִקְדְּשֵׁ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל יֶחֱרָ֑בוּ וְקַמְתִּ֛י עַל־בֵּ֥ית יָרׇבְעָ֖ם בֶּחָֽרֶב׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the high places of the idol shall be thrown down, and the sanctuaries of Israel shall be laid waste: and I will rise up against the house of Jeroboam with the sword.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan Isaakin korkeudet pitää autioksi tuleman, ja Israelin pyhyydet pitää hävitettämän; ja minä tahdon nostaa miekan Jerobeamin huonetta vastaan.
verses.king_james: And the high places of Isaac shall be desolate, and the sanctuaries of Israel shall be laid waste; and I will rise against the house of Jeroboam with the sword.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et misit Amasias, sacerdos Bethel, ad Jeroboam, regem Israël, dicens : Rebellavit contra te Amos in medio domus Israël ; non poterit terra sustinere universos sermones ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֗ח אֲמַצְיָה֙ כֹּהֵ֣ן בֵּֽית־אֵ֔ל אֶל־יָרׇבְעָ֥ם מֶלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לֵאמֹ֑ר קָשַׁ֨ר עָלֶ֜יךָ עָמ֗וֹס בְּקֶ֙רֶב֙ בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לֹא־תוּכַ֣ל הָאָ֔רֶץ לְהָכִ֖יל אֶת־כׇּל־דְּבָרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Amasias the priest of Bethel sent to Jeroboam king of Israel, saying: Amos hath rebelled against thee in the midst of the house of Israel: the land is not able to bear all his words.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Betelin pappi Amatsia lähetti Israelin kuninkaan tykö, sanoen: Amos tekee kapinan sinua vastaan Israelin huoneessa, eipä maakaan voi kaikkia hänen sanojansa kärsiä.
verses.king_james: Then Amaziah the priest of Beth–el sent to Jeroboam king of Israel, saying, Amos hath conspired against thee in the midst of the house of Israel: the land is not able to bear all his words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc enim dicit Amos : In gladio morietur Jeroboam, et Israël captivus migrabit de terra sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־כֹה֙ אָמַ֣ר עָמ֔וֹס בַּחֶ֖רֶב יָמ֣וּת יָרׇבְעָ֑ם וְיִ֨שְׂרָאֵ֔ל גָּלֹ֥ה יִגְלֶ֖ה מֵעַ֥ל אַדְמָתֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For thus saith Amos: Jeroboam shall die by the sword, and Israel shall be carried away captive out of their own land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä näin sanoo Amos: Jerobeamin täytyy miekalla kuolla, ja Israel pitää vietämän vangittuna pois maastansa.
verses.king_james: For thus Amos saith, Jeroboam shall die by the sword, and Israel shall surely be led away captive out of their own land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Amasias ad Amos : Qui vides, gradere : fuge in terram Juda, et comede ibi panem, et prophetabis ibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֲמַצְיָה֙ אֶל־עָמ֔וֹס חֹזֶ֕ה לֵ֥ךְ בְּרַח־לְךָ֖ אֶל־אֶ֣רֶץ יְהוּדָ֑ה וֶאֱכׇל־שָׁ֣ם לֶ֔חֶם וְשָׁ֖ם תִּנָּבֵֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Amasias said to Amos: Thou seer, go, flee away into the land of Juda: and eat bread there, and prophesy there.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Amatsia sanoi Amokselle: sinä näkiä, mene pois, ja ennusta siellä.
verses.king_james: Also Amaziah said unto Amos, O thou seer, go, flee thee away into the land of Judah, and there eat bread, and prophesy there:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et in Bethel non adjicies ultra ut prophetes, quia sanctificatio regis est, et domus regni est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֵֽית־אֵ֔ל לֹא־תוֹסִ֥יף ע֖וֹד לְהִנָּבֵ֑א כִּ֤י מִקְדַּשׁ־מֶ֙לֶךְ֙ ה֔וּא וּבֵ֥ית מַמְלָכָ֖ה הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: But prophesy not again any more in Bethel: because it is the king's sanctuary, and it is the house of the kingdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja älä Betelissä enään ennusta; se on kuninkaan pyhä sia ja valtakunnan huone.
verses.king_james: But prophesy not again any more at Beth–el: for it is the king’s chapel, and it is the king’s court.

verses.latin_vulgate: Responditque Amos, et dixit ad Amasiam : Non sum propheta, et non sum filius prophetæ : sed armentarius ego sum vellicans sycomoros.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤עַן עָמוֹס֙ וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֶל־אֲמַצְיָ֔ה לֹא־נָבִ֣יא אָנֹ֔כִי וְלֹ֥א בֶן־נָבִ֖יא אָנֹ֑כִי כִּי־בוֹקֵ֥ר אָנֹ֖כִי וּבוֹלֵ֥ס שִׁקְמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Amos answered and said to Amasias: I am not a prophet, nor am I the son of a prophet: but I am a herdsman plucking wild figs.
verses.finnish_biblia: Amos vastasi ja sanoi Amatsialle: en minä ole propheta enkä prophetan poika, vaan minä olen karjan paimen ja marjain hakia.
verses.king_james: Then answered Amos, and said to Amaziah, I was no prophet, neither was I a prophet’s son; but I was an herdman, and a gatherer of sycomore fruit:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tulit me Dominus cum sequerer gregem, et dixit Dominus ad me : Vade, propheta ad populum meum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקָּחֵ֣נִי יְהֹוָ֔ה מֵאַחֲרֵ֖י הַצֹּ֑אן וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֵלַי֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה לֵ֥ךְ הִנָּבֵ֖א אֶל־עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord took me when I followed the flock, and the Lord said to me: Go, prophesy to my people Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herra otti minun karjasta, ja sanoi minulle: mene ja ennusta minun kansaani Israelia vastaan.
verses.king_james: And the Lord took me as I followed the flock, and the Lord said unto me, Go, prophesy unto my people Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc audi verbum Domini :  Tu dicis : Non prophetabis super Israël,  et non stillabis super domum idoli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֖ה שְׁמַ֣ע דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֑ה אַתָּ֣ה אֹמֵ֗ר לֹ֤א תִנָּבֵא֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְלֹ֥א תַטִּ֖יף עַל־בֵּ֥ית יִשְׂחָֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now hear thou the word of the Lord: Thou sayest, thou shalt not prophesy against Israel, and thou shalt not drop thy word upon the house of the idol.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kuule siis Herran sanaa: sinä sanot: älä ennusta Israelia vastaan, älä myös puhu Isaakin huonetta vastaan;
verses.king_james: Now therefore hear thou the word of the Lord: Thou sayest, Prophesy not against Israel, and drop not thy word against the house of Isaac.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc hæc dicit Dominus :  Uxor tua in civitate fornicabitur,  et filii tui et filiæ tuæ in gladio cadent,  et humus tua funiculo metietur :  et tu in terra polluta morieris,  et Israël captivus migrabit de terra sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֞ן כֹּה־אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה אִשְׁתְּךָ֞ בָּעִ֤יר תִּזְנֶה֙ וּבָנֶ֤יךָ וּבְנֹתֶ֙יךָ֙ בַּחֶ֣רֶב יִפֹּ֔לוּ וְאַדְמָתְךָ֖ בַּחֶ֣בֶל תְּחֻלָּ֑ק וְאַתָּ֗ה עַל־אֲדָמָ֤ה טְמֵאָה֙ תָּמ֔וּת וְיִ֨שְׂרָאֵ֔ל גָּלֹ֥ה יִגְלֶ֖ה מֵעַ֥ל אַדְמָתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore thus saith the Lord: Thy wife shall play the harlot in the city, and thy sons and thy daughters shall fall by the sword, and thy land shall be measured by a line: and thou shalt die in a polluted land, and Israel shall go into captivity out of their land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden sanoo Herra näin: sinun emäntäs pitää kaupungissa raiskattaman, ja sinun poikas ja tyttäres pitää miekalla lankeeman, ja sinun peltos pitää nuoralla jaettaman; mutta itse sinun pitää saastaisessa maassa kuoleman, ja Israel pitää ajettaman peräti pois maastansa.
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord; Thy wife shall be an harlot in the city, and thy sons and thy daughters shall fall by the sword, and thy land shall be divided by line; and thou shalt die in a polluted land: and Israel shall surely go into captivity forth of his land.
